name: Ko Olina Lagoon 4
tagline: Calm as a bathtub year-round — the best lagoon for families with babies and toddlers.
parking: Most public parking of the 4 lagoons — free lot
bestTime: Arrive by 8am weekends to guarantee parking; weekdays are easy
talkStory: Lagoon 4 is the least crowded of the four — resort guests cluster at Lagoons 1-3. Bring your own snorkel gear; turtles sometimes swim into the lagoons. All four lagoons are public (ignore any resort signage suggesting otherwise). Combine with dinner at Monkeypod Kitchen nearby.
